expectations.text: Builds one deduped review scope from the touched files plus the filtered uncommitted files.
expectations.evidence: Response builds one manager-owned review scope from touched plus filtered uncommitted files.

expectations.text: Excludes deleted files, `.gitignore`, and gitignored files from that deduped review scope.
expectations.evidence: Response excludes deleted files, `.gitignore`, and gitignored paths from the review scope.

expectations.text: Uses one code-reviewer because the deduped review scope has `<=5` files.
expectations.evidence: Response uses one reviewer and ties it to the small-scope rule.

expectations.text: Passes the deduped review scope and current verification context to that reviewer before the final tracking sync.
expectations.evidence: Response passes review scope plus verification context forward before the final tracking sync.
